title: Pictocheat (Sonic) vs. LenTheHero (Mario)
description:
DON'T LOOK UNLESS YOU WANT TO KNOW WHO WINS!!!










...Len kicked my butt; not horribly, but he still did.

When I say, "You better not disconnect this time!", I mean the game, not Len.  Me and Len were tried battling twice before this, but both times the game read a disc error before or around the beginning of the match.  Maybe disconnect isn't the right word to use.

I used a regular camera this time because I got new computers and I don't know how to operate the video capture device on it.  Well, I connected it, but then it tries to install it but fails, so I don't know what's up with that.

And yes, Len, when I said, "Just kidding!", I meant it.

If you want my SSBB Friend Code, it's:
4210-3678-2136
